scores.correctness_notes: The agent identifies some event names acknowledged in the gold standard (certificate_available, certificate_expiring, certificate_invalidated) but describes an entirely different library (old charms.tls_certificates v3/v4) rather than the current charmlibs-interfaces-tls-certificates v1. It misses the error codes (101/102/103/201) and the interface contract details from the gold standard. The 'when to request' scenarios partially overlap but miss the request_errors trigger.
scores.hallucination_notes: The v3/v4 versioning framework, TLSCertificatesRequiresV4 class, request_certificate_renewal(), all_certificates_invalidated event, and certificate_creation_request/certificate_revocation_request provider events appear to be from an older, different charm library (charms.tls_certificates), not the charmlibs-interfaces-tls-certificates v1 library the gold standard references. The detailed event parameters (carrying ca, chain, etc.) are unverifiable against the gold standard source.
